steps.title: Use the preservation context
steps.content: UNESCO lists heritage sites to champion their preservation, hoping they will not be damaged or neglected. The missing word should name a negative outcome that can happen when a protected place is left alone.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched meanings
steps.content: A does not fit grammatically or logically, B is a positive outcome, and D is neutral. The needed word means to decline or worsen over time, which is exactly what preservation efforts try to prevent. The answer is C.
